welcomeMessage: We're thrilled to have you on board. Start exploring thousands of verified electronics from trusted sellers worldwide.
verifyEmailMessage: Please click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
passwordResetMessage: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one.
twoFactorMessage: Your two-factor authentication code is: {code}. It expires in 10 minutes.
newDeviceMessage: We detected a sign-in to your account from a new device. If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately.
saleConfirmationMessage: Congratulations! Your listing {listingName} has been sold. The buyer's payment is being held securely in escrow.
purchaseConfirmationMessage: Your order for {listingName} has been confirmed. Your payment is being held securely until you confirm receipt.
shippingUpdateMessage: Your order {orderId} has been shipped. Track your package to stay updated on delivery.
disputeOpenedMessage: A dispute has been opened for order {orderId}. Our team will review the case and get back to you shortly.
disputeResolvedMessage: The dispute for order {orderId} has been resolved. Please check the resolution details in your dashboard.
refundProcessedMessage: A refund of {amount} has been processed for order {orderId}. It may take 3-5 business days to appear in your account.
verificationApprovedMessage: Your identity verification has been approved. You now have access to all platform features.
verificationRejectedMessage: Your identity verification was not approved. Please resubmit your documents with the required corrections.
accountSuspendedMessage: Your account has been temporarily suspended. Please contact support for more information.
newMessageMessage: {senderName} has sent you a message regarding {listingName}. Tap to read and reply.
offerReceivedMessage: You've received an offer of {amount} on {listingName}. Review and respond before it expires.
offerAcceptedMessage: Great news! Your offer of {amount} on {listingName} has been accepted. Proceed to checkout to complete your purchase.
offerRejectedMessage: Your offer of {amount} on {listingName} was declined. You can make a new offer or browse similar listings.
listingApprovedMessage: Your listing {listingName} has been approved and is now live and visible to buyers.
listingRejectedMessage: Your listing {listingName} was not approved. Please review the feedback and resubmit with the necessary changes.
reviewReceivedMessage: {buyerName} has left a {rating}-star review for your listing {listingName}. See what they had to say.
marketingMessage: Check out the latest deals and offers handpicked for you on Electronix Marketplace.
